# konnect_portal_idp_team_group_mapping (Resource)

PortalIdpTeamGroupMapping Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "konnect_portal_idp_team_group_mapping" "my_portalidpteamgroupmapping" {
  group     = "API Engineers"
  id        = "d32d905a-ed33-46a3-a093-d8f536af9a8a"
  portal_id = "f32d905a-ed33-46a3-a093-d8f536af9a8a"
  team_id   = "6801e673-cc10-498a-94cd-4271de07a0d3"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group` (String) The IdP group name. Requires replacement if changed.
- `id` (String) ID of the identity provider. Requires replacement if changed.
- `portal_id` (String) The Portal identifier. Requires replacement if changed.
- `team_id` (String) The Konnect team ID. Requires replacement if changed.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `mapping_id` (String) ID of the team group mapping.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = konnect_portal_idp_team_group_mapping.my_konnect_portal_idp_team_group_mapping
  id = jsonencode({
    id         = "d32d905a-ed33-46a3-a093-d8f536af9a8a"
    mapping_id = "..."
    portal_id  = "f32d905a-ed33-46a3-a093-d8f536af9a8a"
  })
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import konnect_portal_idp_team_group_mapping.my_konnect_portal_idp_team_group_mapping '{"id": "d32d905a-ed33-46a3-a093-d8f536af9a8a", "mapping_id": "...", "portal_id": "f32d905a-ed33-46a3-a093-d8f536af9a8a"}'
```
